title: malesherbia obtusa var. johnstonii
intro: Malesherbia obtusa var. johnstonii is a rare and lesser-known species of flowering plant in the family Polygonaceae, native to the Andes mountains in South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues, such as bloating and indigestion. The health benefits of Malesherbia obtusa var. johnstonii include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with conditions such as arthritis. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are available in some herbal medicine stores and online retailers.
